commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR flattens generated Plugin SDK declarations under `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts`, repoints extension package-boundary aliases, excludes `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` from npm packages, and adds installed-package TypeScript smoke coverage to release-check.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +51, Config +7, Other +150. Total +212 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding at source level: release/prepack writes the dist inventory before packing, the writer still includes non-QA `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` files, and the tarball checker rejects inventory entries missing from the tarball. I did not run build/package commands because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can align inventory generation and tests with the new package exclusion without deciding a new API direction.

target.title: Refactor plugin SDK declarations for flat package types
target.body:
## Summary

- Stack this declaration-layout refactor on #87120, which already removes the Vitest-backed test helper SDK subpaths from public package exports.
- Generate bundled flat plugin SDK declarations directly under `dist/plugin-sdk/*.d.ts` instead of shipping public shims that point into `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**`.
- Move extension package-boundary aliases to the flat declaration layout while preserving private local QA aliases that are intentionally not public package exports.
- Exclude `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` from the npm package and add installed-tarball TypeScript consumer proof to `release-check`.

## Size Impact

Measured after `pnpm build` with `npm --silent pack --json --ignore-scripts --pack-destination <tmp>`.

Baseline is #87120's post-cleanup pack measurement, since that PR removes public test-helper exports before this refactor applies.

- #87120 baseline: tarball 17,603,764 bytes; unpacked 78,101,717 bytes; 12,470 files; `dist/plugin-sdk` 4,605 files / 6,990,145 bytes.
- This PR stacked on #87120: tarball 16,828,534 bytes; unpacked 74,850,385 bytes; 9,015 files; `dist/plugin-sdk` 1,150 files / 3,738,782 bytes.
- Net vs #87120: tarball -775,230 bytes; unpacked -3,251,332 bytes; file count -3,455; `dist/plugin-sdk` -3,455 files / -3,251,363 bytes.

The packed artifact now has `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0. The deep tree removal is partially offset by 843 flat root declaration chunks totaling 3,321,723 bytes, which keep public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports resolving from the installed package.

## Verification

- `pnpm build`
- `npm --silent pack --json --ignore-scripts --pack-destination <tmp>`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-flat-declaration-refactor-stacked node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/release-check.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-package-project-boundaries.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/release-check.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
  - provider: blacksmith-testbox through Crabbox
  - Testbox id: `tbx_01kskx988n6hs48wpfyx1e03az`
  - Result: 108 plugins compiled; exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Installed package no longer ships the unnecessary deep `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` declaration tree while public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` TypeScript imports continue resolving.
Real environment tested: Local macOS Node 24 build/package checks plus Blacksmith Testbox Linux package-boundary compile through Crabbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.
Evidence after fix: npm pack measurement shows `dist/plugin-sdk/src/**` count 0; release-check installed a packed tarball into temporary consumer projects and ran TypeScript against representative SDK imports; Testbox compiled 108 plugin package-boundary projects.
Observed result after fix: Build, release-check, focused Vitest, and Testbox package-boundary compile passed.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check`/full test suite was not run locally; package-boundary broad proof was run remotely instead.
target.author: romneyda
